/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation -Wsuggest-override -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g  -Wl,-rpath,'$ORIGIN/../../private' -shared -Wl,-soname,libmysqlharness_tls.so.1 -o ../../../../library_output_directory/libmysqlharness_tls.so.1 CMakeFiles/harness_tls.dir/tls_client_context.cc.o CMakeFiles/harness_tls.dir/tls_context.cc.o CMakeFiles/harness_tls.dir/tls_error.cc.o CMakeFiles/harness_tls.dir/tls_server_context.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
